name: Zenitsu Agatsuma
description:
A mega storm unlike anything before has formed over Japan, making the sky’s dark and the stakes high. Lighting and thunder has been everywhere, causing multiple casualties and fires.

(Art isn’t mine but I can’t find the artist so credit to them! 🫶)

Hashira - Natural Disasters!

I might even do the demons as part of the series too if y’all want me too.

The following characters are who I’ll be including in the series, however, don’t be afraid to request any other characters.

  • Mitsuri - Zombie apocalypse ✅

  • Giyuu - Flash Flood ✅

  • Shinobu - Infectious disease ✅

  • Rengoku - World apocalypse ✅

  • Muichiro - Poisonous mist ✅

  • Gyomei - Earthquake ✅

  • Obanai - Poisonous animal mutation ✅

  • Sanemi - Tornados ✅

  • Tanjiro - Asteroids ✅

  • Zenitsu - Mega Storm

  • Inosuke - Rabies

  • Nezuko - Facility containment breach

  • Tengen - Death angels

Also credit to the amazing Rutub for helping me out with ideas for Nezuko and Tengen! ❤️

Key words: Zenitsu, Agatsuma, Zenitsu Agatsuma, Agatsuma Zenitsu, Demon slayer, Kimitsu No Yaiba, Anime, lightning, Natural disaster, Survival, Storm, Megastorm

Hope y’all like the series, and as always I’m open to feedback and suggestion~
creator: 04Yato
